64763.「……そんなんで ホントに 大丈夫かよ！？: Oi, lass... Are ya sure yer okay with that?!

64764.「とにかく 人手が必要なの！\n お願いっ！ 私たちにチカラを貸して！:
Never mind thatーI just need your
help! Please!

64766.「……しょうがねえ。\n オマエを信じて 協力してやるよ。\n 手はず通りに 動:
Fine. I owe you one, so count me in.
I'll trust whatever your plan is.

64769.「このままだと きっとまた ヒョッヒョマンが\n ゴリウスさんを操って <pc>:
That nyeh-heh guy is bound to control Gorius
again and come after you...so I was coming up
with a plan to ambush him.

64770.「今の父には 剣も 呪文も効きませんから\n 霊体を相手に 戦う方法について\n:
Since normal attacks won't work on my father,
I researched various ways in which to fight a
spirit.

64771.「そうしたら セラフィさんが\n 霊を実体化させて とどめておく\n 魔法陣の存:
That's when Seraphi discovered a kind of magic
circle...it'll materialize a spirit back into
the real world and hold them in place!

64772.「でもね その魔法陣を描く材料が\n 今のところ 全然 足りてないんだ。:
But we're completely out of the materials
needed to draw the circle...

64773.「材料さえ 集めることができれば\n 魔法陣を描いて ゴリウスさんの怨霊を\n:
If we just had those materials, then I know
we could use it to stop Gorius' spirit...

64774.「それで 悪いんだけど その材料を集めるのを\n <pc>さんにも 手伝ってもら:
I'm sorry to ask, but I need your help to
gather those materials. Do you think you
can help me?

64775.「ありがとう！ <pc>さんに\n 集めてきてほしいのは 具象の霊灰って材料よ。:
Thanks! I need you collect something called
Embodying Ash for me. Five piles should do it.

64776.「こっちの世界の アラハギーロ地方にいる\n <%sEV_QUE_NAME0>を:
I heard that you can get it if you beat the
Cloud Surfers outside of town.

64777.「<pc>さん ご迷惑をおかけしますが\n どうか よろしくお願いします……。:
Apologies for putting you through this
busywork. We're both counting on you...

64778.「じゃあ 私たちは ここで\n 他の準備をして 待ってるわ。\n 手に入ったら:
We'll stay here and get everything else
ready. Come back here when you've gotten
it!

64779.「ホント！？ あっ でも……\n <pc>さん 他の人からの頼まれごとも\n い:
You will?! Oh, but...it looks like you've got
your hands full helping others right now.

64780.「私たち ここで 待ってるから\n 用事が終わったら 来てくれる？:
We'll wait here for you, so can you come
back when you're free?

64781.「そっか……。これをまかせられるの\n <pc>さんしか いないんだけどな……。:
I see... But you're the only one who can do
this...

64782.「私たち ここで待ってるから\n また 気が変わったら 来てね。:
We'll be waiting for you here, so please
come back if you change your mind.

64784.「私たち ゴリウスさんの怨霊を\n 迎え撃つ 効果的な方法を見つけたの！:
We've found a way to stop Gorius' spirit in
its tracks!

64785.「それはね ゴリウスさんを 特別な魔法陣で\n 実体化させて 剣や 呪文が効くよ:
The idea is to use a special magic circle to
materialize his spirit back into our worldー
then our attacks will work on him!

64786.「でも その魔法陣を描く材料が 全然\n 足りてないの。材料さえ集められれば\n:
But we're completely out of the materials
needed to draw the circle...

64787.「それで 悪いんだけど その材料を集めるのを\n <pc>さんにも 手伝ってもら:
I'm sorry to ask, but I need your help to
gather those materials. Do you think you
can help me?

64788.「魔法陣を 描くための材料で\n <pc>さんに 集めてきてもらいたいのは\n:
I need five piles of Embodying Ash to be
able to draw the magic circle.

64789.「こっちの世界の アラハギーロ地方にいる\n <%sEV_QUE_NAME0>を:
I heard that you can get it by beating
Cloud Surfers in the area outside of
town.

64790.「材料が集まれば 魔法陣で\n ゴリウスさんの怨霊を 実体化させて\n 戦うこと:
With that ash, then I think we have a chance
at putting a stop to Gorius' spirit with that
magic circle.

64791.「私たちは ここで準備してるから\n 具象の霊灰を 手に入れたら 戻ってきて！\:
We'll stay here and get everything else ready.
Please come back here once you've gotten
it!

64792.「あ <pc>さん！ おかえりなさい。\n お願いした 具象の霊灰を\n 持って:
<pc>! Welcome back!
Did you get the ash?

64793.「他の材料は 全部 集まったの！\n あと必要なのは その具象の霊灰だけよ。\n:
I've gathered all of the other materials we
need, so all that's left is the ash. Could
you please give it to me?<yesno><close>

64794.「そんな！ それがないと 魔法陣が描けないわ。\n <pc>さん 意地悪しないで:
But I can't draw the magic circle without it!
Please don't be mean... Can you give the
ash to me?<yesno><close>

64796.「ありがとう！ これがあれば\n ゴリウスさんの怨霊を実体化させる 魔法陣を\n:
Thanks! Now we can finally draw that
magic circle...

64797.「セラフィ！ 手はず通り\n 格闘場の 闘いの広間を 使えるように\n ハナシ:
Seraphi! I've arranged for you to be able
to use the Monstrous Pit in the arena, just
like you asked.

64800.「あのヒョッヒョマンは ゴリウスさんの怨霊を\n 操って また <pc>さんを\:
We all know that nyeh-heh guy is controlling
Gorius' spirit to come after you again,
<pc>...

64801.「だから 格闘場の 闘いの広間へ\n <pc>さんが 来てくれれば\n アイツを:
So if you were to go inside the Monstrous
Pit, we could lure him there!

64802.「その闘いの広間に 魔法陣を描いておいて\n ゴリウスさんの怨霊が来たら\n 実:
We'll draw the magic circle inside the arena,
and when Gorius' spirit shows up, we'll be
able to attack him after he materializes.

64803.「じゃあ 作戦開始ね！\n <pc>さん 準備ができたら\n 格闘場の闘いの広間:
Okay, then! Let's begin!
When you're ready, <pc>, make
your way to the Monstrous Pit in the arena.

64805.「父は 現れるでしょうか……。: I do hope my father shows up...

64807.「お待たせしていたようですね。\n ヒョーッヒョッヒョ。:
Sorry to keep you all waiting...
Nyeh heh heh!

64809.「ヒョヒョッ？ ほう……。\n 霊を実体化させる 魔法陣とは\n 足りないアタマ:
What do we have here...? A magic circle that
can materialize spirits? I suppose there lies
something in those heads of yours...

64810.「しかし こんな小細工など\n 今のゴリウス君なら ものともせず\n あなたたち:
However...as he is now, Gorius won't be
privy to such cheap tricks and will gladly
smash you to a bleeding pulp.

64813.「セラフィ！ 応援に来てやったぞ。: We're here to root for you, Seraphi!

64814.「いけ セラフィ！\n <cs_pchero>！！\n 怨霊どもを ぶっとばせ！: Go get 'em! Send that spirit packin'!

64815.「え…… どうして みんな……。\n ここは危険よ！ 早く離れてっ！！:
What? But why...?
It's not safe here! You gotta leave, now!

64816.「オレたちだって 手伝ったんだから\n 最後まで 見届けさせろよ。:
We helped too, ya know. So we're here to see
it through to the end.

64818.「ヒョーッヒョッヒョ！\n もうすぐ 自分たちも滅ぼされるというのに\n いい気:
Nyeh heh heh! Such optimism, even though your
destruction is nigh!

64820.「ヒョヒョ！ このゴリウス君のパワーを見ても\n そんなこと 言ってられますかね:
Nyeh heh! You won't be saying that once you
witness Gorius' power! <cs_pchero>!
You'll be the first to die!

64823.「ヒョーッヒョッヒョ。\n またもや やられに来るとは 愚かですねぇ。:
Nyeh heh heh! Are you really so foolish as
to come back for yet another thrashing?

64824.「何度でも たたきのめし ゴリウス君の性能を\n 思い知らせてさしあげましょう！:
I'll squash you flat as many times as it
takes! You'll soon learn of the majesty of
my Gorius' power!

64827.「お おのれ またしても 私の最高傑作を……。\n くっ こうなったら……。:
Y...you blasted... Once again, my greatest
masterpiece has been... Ggh...
It seems I have no choice...

64828.「ヒョヒョッ……。\n 怨念のチカラを 限界以上に引きだし\n 呪いを暴走させて:
Nyeh heh heh... I drew out his resentful power
far beyond its limits, and sent the curse
spiraling out of control!

64829.「この呪いに触れた者は 瞬時に\n 心臓が凍りつき 死に絶えるでしょう……。:
Those who contract the curse will find
their hearts frozen in an instant, killing
them...

64830.「ヒョーッヒョッヒョ！ \n やがて このチカラは\n レンダーシア全土をも包み:
Nyeh heh heh heh! Soon, this power will
envelop the whole of Lendersia!

64831.「このまま なすすべなく\n すべて凍りつき 破滅していくがいい……。\n ヒョ:
There's no point in trying to fight it...
Let everything freeze and crumble to
nothing... Nyeh heh heh heh...

64833.「このままじゃ まずいわ……。\n <cs_pchero>さん どうしようっ！？:
This is really bad...
What should we do?!

64834.「セラフィさん 大丈夫です。\n 今度こそ 父を止めてみせます。:
Don't worry, Seraphi.
I will stop him.

64838.「父さん…… もう やめましょう。: Father... Let's put a stop to this.

64840.「……父さん。\n ベルムドを 復讐に駆り立てたのは\n あなた自身では ありま:
Father... Was it not YOU who drove Bermud to
seek revenge?!

64841.「ですが 兵士長。あなたが 魔物の命を\n 盾にしても 国と民を 守ろうとしてい:
Captain... We all know you were trying to
protect this country, even if it meant using
monsters as human shields.

64842.「そうです！ 悪評に まみれようとも\n 国を守ることを優先した あなたを\n:
That's right! Even if it meant destroying your
reputation, you chose to put your country
first. For that, you have my respect!

64843.「厳しいけれど あなたは誰よりも強かった……。\n 自らの怨念になど 負けないで:
Though you were strict, you were stronger than
anyone else... You mustn't be overcome by your
own hatred. If anyone can conquer it, you can!

64844.「ううっ…… へいしちょおぉ……。\n もう一度 アンタの強さ……\n アンタの:
(sob)... Captain, please...just one more
time... Show us how strong you are...
Show us that heroic spirit!

64845.「父さん！ 犯した過ちを償いましょう。\n そして 憎しみの連鎖を 断つのです。:
Father! Let us atone for the wrongs we have
committed. We'll put an end to this cycle of
hatred!

64849.「アラハギーロを守るためには 人に恨まれても\n しかたないと思っていた……。そ:
To protect Al-Ahagiro, I thought the only way
was to bear the hatred from others...and it
was exactly that that turned me into a beast.

64850.「犠牲になった命のために……\n 私たちも 父さんと共に いきます。:
For the sake of all the lives that have been
lost... We'll go with youーtogether.

64851.「もう本当に 終わるのだな……。\n なんと 長い戦いであったことか……:
So it's truly over, then...
What a long battle this has been...

64855.「アラハギーロを守りたいって気持ちは\n 誰もが おんなじだったのに どうして\:
We all shared the same desire to protect
Al-Ahagiro... So why did things have to end
like this...?

64856.「……アイツらは 長く 悲しい戦いの日々から\n ようやく 解き放たれることが:
Thanks to you, they could finally free
themselves from those long and awful days
of war.

64857.「……えっ？\n もしかして また 何かあったのかな。\n <cs_pchero:
Huh? Did something happen again?
Come on, let's head into town!

64859.「セラフィ！ やってくれたじゃねーか！: You did it! You really did it!

64860.「あんがとね！ アラハギーロを守ってくれて。: Thanks for protecting Al-Ahagiro for us!

64861.「おー <cs_pchero>！\n オメーも なかなか がんばってたな。: Oh, and <cs_pchero>! Ya did well too!

64864.「そんな…… あれは <cs_pchero>さんや\n タジウスさんの おかげだ:
No... You should be thanking <cs_pchero>
and Tajius instead! I only helped just a
little...

64865.「……なぁ セラフィ。\n じつは みんなで 考えてたんだけどさ……:
Actually, Seraphi...
We were all thinking, and...

64866.「オマエ オレたちのリーダーになって\n この国を 引っぱっていってくれないか？:
Will you become our leader, and help guide
this country?

64868.「この国のために 必死になってるオマエを見て\n 思ったんだ。この国をまとめられ:
When I saw how far you went for our sake, I
started thinking... You might just be the only
one able to unite us.

64869.「待って待って！ ム…ムリだよ！\n 私に リーダーなんか……:
Wait, hang on! I...I can't!
I'm no leader!

64870.「この国を守るのが オマエの夢なんだろ？\n だったら きっちり リーダーになっ:
Is it not your dream to protect this place?
Then you should become a proper leader,
so that dream of yours comes true!

64872.「リーダーとか ガラじゃないけど……\n これからも このアラハギーロと\n み:
I'm not cut out for leading anything, but...
I'll do my best to protect Al-Ahagiro and
everyone living here!

64873.「<cs_pchero>さん。そういうわけで\n 私 ここのリーダーになっちゃう:
So I guess I'm gonna be some kind of leader
here now.

64874.「……あっ そうだ！\n とりあえず リーダーの初仕事として\n <cs_pch:
Ah, of course! As my first task as leader,
I have to show you my appreciation for your
help!

64875.「これまで ずーっと <cs_pchero>さんには\n 頼りっぱなしだったけど:
I've had to always rely on you...but from now
on, I'll be sure to work together with
everyone to keep the town safe.

64876.「今まで 本当にありがとね！\n 私たちの作る 新しい国に 期待してて！:
Thanks so much for everything you've done!
We're gonna build a brand new countryー
just you wait!

93436.「なぁ……セラフィ。\n ちょっと 城下町まで来てくれよ。 \n 話しておきたい:
Say, Seraphi... Could you come into town for
a bit? There's something I wanna talk with you
about.
